document.source_title: Axar Patel finally comes good with bat as Delhi stay alive by beating Punjab Kings

claims.claim_text: Madhav Tiwari made an impact with both bat and ball.
claims.evidence_text: Madhav Tiwari found himself back on the big stage on Monday, drafted into the DC playing XI for a must-win clash against PBKS. By the end of the night, the youngster had made an impact with both bat and ball.

claims.claim_text: Axar Patel scored 56 runs off 30 balls.
claims.evidence_text: Axar fell trying to clear long-on off Stoinis. But his 56 off 30 balls kept Delhi alive in the chase.

claims.claim_text: David Miller scored 51 runs off 28 balls.
claims.evidence_text: Miller reached his half-century off just 28 balls with back-to-back sixes off Ben Dwarshuis.
